indicators.name: large dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large for a comfortable computer workstation and lacks a dedicated surface for a keyboard and mouse.

indicators.name: stools
indicators.rationale: The stools are not suitable for prolonged computer work as they lack back support and are not designed for ergonomic use.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is insufficient for extended computer work, as it does not provide adequate task illumination.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: The open layout makes the area susceptible to distractions from other rooms and activities.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large dining table and lack of ergonomic seating make it difficult to set up a proper workstation. The low lighting and open layout contribute to a less than ideal environment for focused knowledge work.
